overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing exploration of a cozy, warmly lit common room with stone architecture and wooden beams. The player character walks through the main hall with a large fireplace, encounters a ghost, and proceeds through circular doorways into a corridor leading to a bedroom dormitory.

scene_state.functional_zone: Hufflepuff common room main hall with central fireplace

events.description: character approaches the large stone fireplace and stops briefly to observe the fire

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room main hall and approaching the fireplace to look at the flames

notable_agents.action: student sitting on red velvet sofa reading a book near the fireplace

entered.detail: ornate stone fireplace with burning fire and carved wooden mantelpiece
plush red upholstered seating furniture near the fireplace
black iron pots suspended from ceiling beams on chains
green vines and foliage dangling from wooden ceiling beams
decorative wooden railing on upper level overlooking the common room
carved wooden doorways with stone surrounds leading to other areas

segments.scene_description: The character explores the main common room hall, walking past comfortable seating areas toward a large stone fireplace. The space features warm lighting from the fire and lamps, with plants hanging from the ceiling and iron pots suspended on chains. Other students sit on red velvet sofas reading as the character approaches the fireplace.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room main hall departing fireplace area

events.description: character turns away from fireplace and walks back toward the center of the room
translucent ghost figure in white dress appears and walks across the room

agents.ego_description: walking away from the fireplace toward the back of the common room, passing other students seated in chairs

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure in white dress walking through the common room

entered.detail: large circular patterned rug covering the stone floor in the center of the room

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the fireplace and walks back through the main hall, passing over a large round woven rug. A translucent ghostly figure walks through the space, and the character heads toward the back archway while other students remain seated in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: back room with circular stained glass doorways

events.description: character walks through archway into room with multiple circular doorways

agents.ego_description: entering the back room and exploring the area with circular doorways and sitting areas

entered.detail: round doorways with decorative stained glass panels and carved wooden frames
small wooden tables with lamps and books scattered about
potted greenery and shrubs placed near the doorways

segments.scene_description: The character enters a new room through a wooden archway, revealing a space with distinctive circular doorways featuring stained glass. The room contains wooden tables with lamps and potted plants, with a stone balcony visible on the upper level. Other students sit in armchairs reading as the character explores the perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to dormitory bedroom

events.description: character enters narrow arched corridor with low ceiling
character enters bedroom dormitory with beds and study desks

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor and entering the private bedroom area

entered.detail: low curved stone ceiling corridor with wooden support beams
wooden bed frame with curtains and white bedding
study desk with chair and various items on top
circular window with stained glass above the far wall

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the circular doorway room and enters a narrow corridor with arched stone ceilings, then proceeds into a private bedroom dormitory. The room contains four-poster beds, wooden desks, and a round stained glass window, with carpeted floors replacing the stone tiles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cozy, communal hall into the private quarters of a student dormitory. It begins by navigating the main common room, passing red velvet sofas and hanging plants toward the warm glow of a large stone fireplace. As the character turns away from the hearth, the camera glides across a large woven rug and past a translucent ghostly figure before heading toward a rear archway. The scene then opens into a transitional space characterized by circular stained-glass doorways and wooden tables, eventually shifting through a narrow stone corridor. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera enters a private bedroom dormitory, where stone tiles give way to carpeted floors and four-poster beds beneath a round stained-glass window.
